original_title: HH072-25-HB Specialist Environmental Aids for Deaf People
buyer_name: NHS Highland
english_summary: NHS Highland is procuring a comprehensive service for the supply, maintenance, and management of specialist environmental aids and equipment for individuals with hearing loss across the Highland region. The service includes equipment provision on a loan basis, repairs, WEEE-compliant recycling/disposal, and training for deaf support staff.
what_they_want: Specialist environmental aids and equipment for deaf people; maintenance and repair services for hearing loss equipment; equipment recycling and disposal services compliant with WEEE regulations; training and advisory support services for deaf support staff on equipment operation and functionality.
eligibility_requirements: Suitably qualified organisation (no specific certifications, experience level, or company size requirements mentioned in the notice).

buyer_name: The Common Services Agency (more commonly known as NHS National Services Scotland) (NSS)
english_summary: This is a framework agreement for the provision of comprehensive cardiology catheterization laboratory supplies and stents for use across NHS Scotland facilities. The tender covers 23 lots including balloon catheters, diagnostic and guide catheters, drug eluting stents, imaging consumables (IVUS/OCT), vascular closure devices, and various cardiology accessories.
what_they_want: Balloon Catheters; Diagnostic Catheters; Guide Catheters; Guide Extension Catheters; Femoral Introducers; Radial Introducers; Radial Compression Devices; FFR Measurement Systems; Intra Aortic Balloon Catheters; Inflation Devices; Vascular Closure Devices; IVUS Consumables; OCT Consumables; Workhorse Drug Eluting Stents; High Risk Bleed Drug Eluting Stents; Niche Drug Eluting Stents; Drug Eluting Balloons; Angio Guidewires; Calcium Management devices; Accessories lot for items used in association with Lots 1-20; Innovation lot for unique new items; Commitment lot for value/volume commitments.
evaluation_criteria: Lots 1-20 are scored lots; Lot 21 (Accessories) is unscored and requires successful award to one of Lots 1-20; Lot 22 (Innovation) is unscored and suppliers automatically awarded if successful in any Lots 1-20; Lot 23 (Commitment) is unscored and available to suppliers awarded to one or more scored Lots 1-20; Lot 24 (Calcium Management) is unscored. Specific scoring weightings not provided.

buyer_name: APUC Limited
english_summary: This is a framework agreement for the supply of microscopy and imaging equipment to Scottish higher education institutions. The tender covers a wide range of optical microscopes from low-end teaching equipment (under £10,000) to high-end research systems (over £10,000), including advanced laser microscopy, super resolution systems, detectors, light sources, and high-content screening equipment.
what_they_want: Low-end optical microscopes (under £10,000 excl. VAT) including compound microscopes (upright/inverted with optional fluorescence and cameras), stereo/zoom microscopes, and gel documentation systems. High-end optical microscopes (over £10,000 excl. VAT) including compound microscopes, stereo/zoom microscopes, label-free holographic microscopes, automated live cell microscopes, and slide scanners. Advanced laser microscopy systems (confocal, spinning disc, TIRF, light sheet, multi-photon). Super resolution microscopy equipment (STED, GSD, SPDMphymod). FLIM/FRET systems and structured illumination systems. Specialist cameras and detectors (PMTs, FLIM detectors) for life science and materials research. Light sources (incandescent lamps, halogen bulbs, arc lamps, LED light sources, lasers). High-content screening systems with associated software and automatic sample handling equipment.
eligibility_requirements: Economic operators may be excluded if they are in any of the situations referred to in regulation 58 of the Public Contracts (Scotland) Regulations 2015 (mandatory and discretionary exclusion grounds including bankruptcy, criminal convictions, professional misconduct, etc.).

buyer_name: APUC Limited

eligibility_requirements: Contractors must be able to price and supply minimum 71.75% (170 line items) of Core Product List for Lot 1, and minimum 64.71% (22 line items) for Lot 2. Economic operators may be excluded if they fall under situations referred to in regulation 58 of the Public Contracts (Scotland) Regulations 2015.
